records.blocked_requirement: Tier A immutable post-snapshot model inference
records.root_cause: DeepSeek-V4-Flash open weights exist (HF rev 60d8d707) but are 284B params; no GPU inference capability in this environment; hosted alias not proven byte-identical to the checkpoint
records.invariant_at_risk: model cannot use resolved outcomes through an unacknowledged path

alternatives.name: Tier A rented-GPU hosting of pinned checkpoint
alternatives.verdict: infeasible here (no provisioning path from this environment); recorded as unblock path

alternatives.name: Tier B provider-attested alias + post-release question opening + blinding + probes
alternatives.verdict: SELECTED: even mutated serving weights cannot contain outcomes of events that had not occurred at release unless retrained on them post-release — which the per-row probes measure

alternatives.name: Tier C blinding alone on pre-release events
alternatives.verdict: weaker (model may know pre-release events outright); not needed given post-release corpus

records.selected: Tier B + blinding + six probes (belt and braces)
records.validity: temporal ordering S<Q<=T<R proven per row from archive server timestamps; leakage actively measured, not assumed

records.root_cause: the post-snapshot window is only 2026-04-25..2026-07-12; Polymarket contains ~99-200 events that opened AND resolved inside it with >=12d lifetime and real volume; Kalshi and Metaculus APIs are unreachable through this environment's proxy (000/403)

alternatives.name: add Kalshi/Metaculus
alternatives.verdict: blocked by proxy (000/403) — recorded; unblock = allowlist those hosts

alternatives.name: widen frozen Polymarket rules (volume>=1000, lifetime>=12d, R<=2026-07-12)
alternatives.verdict: SELECTED: preserves every leakage invariant; adds smaller-volume real events; pool size recorded honestly

records.selected: widened frozen Polymarket rules; pool recorded; if pool < 100 worlds the benchmark reports the exact shortfall rather than substituting ineligible events
records.validity: selection rules re-frozen BEFORE any forecast exists; no model performance seen
records.residual_limitation: if eligible pool < 300, power target unmet; reported

records.blocked_requirement: container/OS-level network isolation for the forecaster
records.root_cause: single-container environment; LLM API is a required network dependency; no per-process egress policy control

alternatives.name: unshare -n network namespace
alternatives.verdict: REJECTED: kills the required LLM API access

alternatives.name: pre-frozen capsules + no retrieval code path + sealed store guard + freeze hashes
alternatives.verdict: SELECTED: the runtime consumes prebuilt_bundle (no retrieval call sites on the replay path); resolution isolation is code-enforced; hashes detect tampering

records.selected: process-level isolation, honestly labeled PARTIAL on every row
records.residual_limitation: a hostile forecaster process could fetch the internet; nothing in the code does
